title: Authorization for mergers, consolidations, and share exchanges
doc_html:
PART XI.  MERGERS, CONSOLIDATIONS,

AND SHARE EXCHANGES

§111.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

Acts 1968, No. 105, §1; Acts 1990, No. 849, §1, eff. for taxable years after Dec. 31, 1989; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
doc_text:
PART XI.  MERGERS, CONSOLIDATIONS,
AND SHARE EXCHANGES
§111.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
Acts 1968, No. 105, §1; Acts 1990, No. 849, §1, eff. for taxable years after Dec. 31, 1989; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
